title: What I think about anastasia and the screaming cedars book 1 - book review

transcript.text: Hello, this is book review Anastasia and the Screaming Cedars. I only read the first book, though, and it's eight books, so just remember that, okay? I only read the first book, and this is, like, a month ago.

Like, if you ever want to go and try and fly an Anastasia. And he met these two guys, and they were, like, claimed that one guy was, like, 139 years old, and the other guy was his father, and that they were, like, really old because they ate these cedar nuts.
So I guess if you eat cedar nuts, it's, like, the super powerful thing that makes you live forever. And, um, and so then he's, like, weird.
